critical_paths.name: Browser app bootstrap and global runtime capture
critical_paths.notes: Entry point and top-level render path for the production SPA; browser SDK initialization belongs here.

critical_paths.name: Client routing and auth callback flow
critical_paths.notes: Path-based routing, including /auth/callback handling, is owned by the SPA hooks and App shell.

critical_paths.name: Google Drive sync auth and session lifecycle
critical_paths.notes: OAuth exchange, session persistence, and Drive proxy behavior span the browser auth hook and Cloudflare Worker auth routes.

critical_paths.name: Cloudflare Worker API surface
critical_paths.notes: The worker handles auth, Drive proxying, invoice email delivery, usage metrics, and health checks.

critical_paths.name: Production build and Pages deployment pipeline
critical_paths.notes: The merged app+blog artifact is built in GitHub Actions and deployed to Cloudflare Pages, so hosted browser tokens must be injected at build time.

developer_workflows.install: docker compose run --rm app npm install
developer_workflows.build: docker compose run --rm app npm run build
developer_workflows.test: docker compose run --rm app npm run test:run

debugbundle.notes: Validated for the Cloudflare Pages React SPA, Astro public site, and Cloudflare Worker deployment used by TaskTime Pro.
